summary: \boxed{\text{Alopecia Areata}} Characterized by non-scaring patchy hair loss often accompanied by short stubble-like vellus hairs at edges; this aligns closely with patient’s described symptoms without evidence for alternative diagnoses such as hormonal changes or systemic conditions causing generalized thinning.
